AI-Scored

Prioritized recommendations based on 4 signals: competitor gap size, blog coverage deficit, category underrepresentation, and suggestion alignment. Higher score = higher priority.

Competitor Gap
How far below market avg Edstellar is (0-30 pts)
Blog Coverage
Categories with low blog-to-course ratio (0-25 pts)
Category Size
Smaller categories get priority for growth (0-25 pts)
Suggestion Match
Courses already validated as suggestions (0-20 pts)
